name: X-Golf Ashburn
address: 43150 Broadlands Center Plaza Suite 168, Broadlands, VA 20148
about: X-Golf Ashburn is a premier indoor golf venue located in Broadlands Center Plaza. The facility features state-of-the-art golf simulators that utilize a combination of camera systems, infrared lasers, and impact sensors to provide unparalleled accuracy and realism. Beyond the technology, the venue offers a full-service bar and kitchen with seasonal specials, local craft beers, and customizable event spaces, making it a hub for both entertainment and training.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with impact sensors and 3D swaying analysis
Full bar and restaurant with seasonal food and drink specials
Private and spacious bays accommodating up to 6 players
Professional lessons and leagues available on-site
Customizable event space for parties and corporate outings
VIP Membership options for discounted rates

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with seasonal specials, appetizers, and main courses
Iced cold local craft and domestic beers on tap, handcrafted cocktails, and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: Uses camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software for 3D ball flight and club path analysis

amenities_list: Full Bar|Restaurant|Events Space|PuttView Technology|Golf Pro Lessons|League Play|VIP Memberships|Private Event Bay|Restrooms

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, you do not need to bring your own clubs. While many golfers prefer their own set, the venue offers club rentals upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full bar and kitchen offering a wide selection of meals, appetizers, and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes an individual about 45 to 60 minutes to complete 18 holes. If sharing a bay, it is recommended to allocate one hour per person to play a full round.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf Ashburn is family-friendly and welcomes children of all ages. They offer 'Mens, Womens, & Kids' club rentals and the simulators are suitable for all skill levels.
